framework.name: NIST AI Agent Standards Initiative (3 Pillars)
framework.description: NIST CAISI launched Feb 2026 with industry-led standards, community-led protocols, and research into agent authentication/identity. RFI closed March 9; NCCoE concept paper on agent identity/authorization open through April 2.
framework.raw_quote: NIST conducts fundamental research into agent authentication and identity infrastructure to enable secure human-agent and multi-agent interactions.

source.title: NIST AI Agent Standards Initiative: What Companies Need to Know
